issues: compute_signal logic mixes signal generation and exit logic; exit logic should be separate from signal trigger
signal trigger uses >40% increase but includes exit logic before entry check, causing possible incorrect signals
indentation errors in compute_signal (e.g. return statements not properly indented)
target_allocations logic does not cap total exposure correctly if multiple positions exist (sum of current_positions.values() may not reflect total exposure accurately)
target_allocations returns allocation for all universe tickers without checking if signal is HOLD (should return empty)
